name: canshare-who-lung-site-histology
title: NZ WHO lung site histology
description: Histologies used for lung neoplasms (from WHO Classification of Tumours, Thoracic Tumours, latest edition, including sections 2. Tumours of the lung and 5. Mesenchymal tumours of the thorax) or an 'Other' value.
